results.description: DESCRIPTION:THE OBJECTIVE OF THIS PROJECT IS TO DEVELOP A MODEL USING MACHINE-LEARNED BAYESIAN NETWORKS TO ANALYZE DATA SAMPLES TO PREDICT PER- AND POLYFLUOROALKYL SUBSTANCES (PFASS) CONTAMINATION SOURCES AND CREATE FATE-AND-TRANSPORT MODELS IN RURAL DRINKING WATER SYSTEMS. THIS RESEARCH FOCUSES ON A MODEL APPROACH INTEGRATED WITH RISK ASSESSMENT, RISK COMMUNICATION, AND PFAS TESTING TO IMPROVE THE ACCURACY OF RISK PREDICTIONS AND TO FACILITATE INFORMED RISK MANAGEMENT DECISIONS FOR PFAS CONTAMINATION IN RURAL/AGRICULTURAL COMMUNITIES.ACTIVITIES:.SUBRECIPIENT:OUTCOMES:.

DESCRIPTION:
THE OBJECTIVE OF THIS PROJECT IS TO DEVELOP A MODEL USING MACHINE-LEARNED BAYESIAN NETWORKS TO ANALYZE DATA SAMPLES TO PREDICT PER- AND POLYFLUOROALKYL SUBSTANCES (PFASS) CONTAMINATION SOURCES AND CREATE FATE-AND-TRANSPORT MODELS IN RURAL DRINKING WATER SYSTEMS. THIS RESEARCH FOCUSES ON A MODEL APPROACH INTEGRATED WITH RISK ASSESSMENT, RISK COMMUNICATION, AND PFAS TESTING TO IMPROVE THE ACCURACY OF RISK PREDICTIONS AND TO FACILITATE INFORMED RISK MANAGEMENT DECISIONS FOR PFAS CONTAMINATION IN RURAL/AGRICULTURAL COMMUNITIES.
ACTIVITIES:
.
OUTCOMES:
.

THE OBJECTIVE OF THIS PROJECT IS TO DEVELOP A MODEL USING MACHINE-LEARNED BAYESIAN NETWORKS TO ANALYZE DATA SAMPLES TO PREDICT PER- AND POLYFLUOROALKYL SUBSTANCES (PFASS) CONTAMINATION SOURCES AND CREATE FATE-AND-TRANSPORT MODELS IN RURAL DRINKING WATER SYSTEMS. THIS RESEARCH FOCUSES ON A MODEL APPROACH INTEGRATED WITH RISK ASSESSMENT, RISK COMMUNICATION, AND PFAS TESTING TO IMPROVE THE ACCURACY OF RISK PREDICTIONS AND TO FACILITATE INFORMED RISK MANAGEMENT DECISIONS FOR PFAS CONTAMINATION IN RURAL/AGRICULTURAL COMMUNITIES.
